title: rosa lutea var. genuina
intro: Rosa lutea var. genuina, also known as the golden rose or yellow wild rose, is a perennial plant species within the Rosa genus, native to North America. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Rosa lutea var. genuina include relief from digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
